finding_results.notes: Leela now reaches for her laptop, names the cloned repositories and Ruderal directly, and the committee shuts the move down as an unsubmitted separate matter before she falls back to the narrower defense argument.

finding_results.notes: Narration now leans on smell, paper, bodily pressure, and social texture rather than repeatedly outsourcing the scene's force to the clean/record/weather/practical diction cluster; the committee members keep the bureaucratic euphemism in their own speech.

summary: Revised the committee hinge so Leela makes a concrete in-room disclosure attempt and gets proceduralized into silence, refreshed the committee narration with more sensory and bodily pressure, and aligned the meeting setup with the chapter 16 blouse-and-blazer handoff.
